body_transformation: The rounded head retains its shape but now features a sleek, electric blue metallic sheen with neon green circuit patterns tracing the contours of the pointed ears. The short stubby legs are now covered in a matte black, conductive material with glowing yellow lightning bolt patterns etched into the joints. The flower-like structure on top transforms into a cluster of jagged, crystalline spines that emit a steady blue-white glow, while the leaf patterns on the body become sharp, angular circuit lines glowing with neon green energy. The curled tail tip now sports a flickering, sparking fur texture with electric blue highlights, and the skin texture takes on a smooth, polished metal surface with subtle crackling energy lines.
signature_feature: Flower-like structure: jagged crystalline spines with steady blue-white glow and neon green energy circuits.
